Home / Services / Oven & Range Repair

Oven & Range Repair

Precise cooking appliance repairs for Orlando homes.

From gas line leaks to electronic control failures, we keep Orlando kitchens cooking safely. Florida's climate causes particular issues with oven igniters, humidity-sensitive electronics, and coastal corrosion.

We service all fuel types including natural gas lines common in newer developments and electric ranges found in mid-century homes. Our technicians are certified in repairing induction cooktops popular in Lake Mary's upscale kitchens and commercial-grade ranges in Thornton Park's chef residences.

Safety is our priority with gas appliance repairs. We conduct thorough leak tests and carbon monoxide checks after every service call. For older homes, we can retrofit outdated electrical connections to meet current Florida building codes.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Safety inspection and gas/electrical system check
  2. 02 Step 2: Component-level diagnosis using manufacturer schematics
  3. 03 Step 3: Precision repair with climate-appropriate parts
  4. 04 Step 4: Calibration and safety verification

Benefits

  • Fast response for holiday cooking emergencies
  • Gas line certification for safety compliance
  • Vintage appliance preservation services
  • Energy efficiency upgrades available

Frequently Asked Questions

Why does my oven take longer to preheat in summer?

High ambient temperatures force components to work harder. We can install upgraded heating elements designed for Florida conditions.

Can you convert my gas range to electric?

Yes, we're licensed for fuel conversion projects common during Orlando kitchen remodels.

How dangerous are faulty oven igniters?

Very - unburned gas can accumulate. We replace worn igniters immediately and conduct complete gas safety checks.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with oven & range repair? Contact us today.
